reviews.review_msg: English is my second language and I was nervous about taking this class.  Scott was highly involved in our online class and provided exceptionally clear and helpful feedback.  I left the class feeling empowered, with new tools to lead the way for many papers to come in university.
Extremely helpful, will go out of his way to help a student in need :) greatly recommended
Scott Marsden is the best teacher ever, plus he is HOT! So good looking its hard to focus on the work when he is teaching.

Definitely agreed with below; Scott is the best TA I've ever had.  He is extremely helpful when it comes to going to his office hours but I think his grading is a little bit hard.  Overall an EXCELLENT TA.
The best T.A I have had in my University life. Always there for help regardless if current TA or not. Very dependable. If ever taking an English class, make sure you have Scott Marsden as your TA.
